title: Partitioned Indexes
description: Architect partitioned index strategies for horizontally partitioned tables. Manage the trade-offs between global and local index performance to mitigate the "Global Index Bottleneck" in distributed databases.
objectives: Architect partitioned index strategies for horizontally partitioned tables.
Manage the trade-offs between global and local index performance to mitigate the "Global Index Bottleneck" in distributed databases.
